'''Amberson''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and one of the [[Peacekeeper (Outbound Flight Colony)|Peacekeepers]] of the [[Outbound Flight Colony]] in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].<ref name="SQ" />
